sections.location: Smoke detectors are located outside the bedroom doors and in the kitchen.
The water heater is located below the house in a crawl space.
The water shut off is located by the curb at the end of the driveway. It will have a metal lid labeled "water".
The electric meter is usually located on the exterior of the house.
There are no cameras at this property.
The thermostat is on first floor located near the stairs on the wall.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
